ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location description of the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was last maintained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station where the measurement was taken */,
  "magx" REAL /* Magnetic field strength in the X direction */,
  "magy" REAL /* Magnetic field strength in the Y direction */,
  "magz" REAL /* Magnetic field strength in the Z direction */,
  "field_strength" REAL /* Total magnetic field strength */,
  "mag_abs_std" REAL /* Standard deviation of the absolute magnetic field strength */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Time when the measurement was taken */,
  "unix_time" INTEGER /* Unix timestamp of the measurement time */,
  "mag_count" INTEGER /* Count of magnetic measurements */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the measurement data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_metadata" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student who collected the data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the measurement */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* Description of the equipment used for the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_metadata_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_metadata_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "university" TEXT /* University the student belongs to */,
  "student_email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the measurement */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method of access (e.g., API, web interface) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being analyzed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)
